mapper.select: select id, question_id, question_stem_snapshot, question_type_name_snapshot, difficulty_snapshot, item_score, display_order, updated_at from paper_question where paper_id = #{paperId} and deleted = 0 order by display_order asc, id asc

select pq.id as paper_question_id, pq.question_id, pq.display_order as question_no, pq.question_stem_snapshot as stem, pq.question_type_name_snapshot as question_type_name, qt.answer_mode, pq.answer_config_snapshot as answer_config, pq.item_score as score from paper_question pq inner join question q on q.id = pq.question_id and q.deleted = 0 inner join question_type qt on qt.id = q.question_type_id and qt.deleted = 0 where pq.paper_id = #{paperId} and pq.deleted = 0 order by pq.display_order asc, pq.id asc
select count(1) from paper_question where paper_id = #{paperId} and deleted = 0
select coalesce(sum(item_score), 0) from paper_question where paper_id = #{paperId} and deleted = 0
select coalesce(max(display_order), 0) from paper_question where paper_id = #{paperId} and deleted = 0
